headline: MGY Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Volumes and Bolt-On Deals
summary: MGY expects production of approximately 105 Mboe/d and Drilling and Completion (D&C) capital spending of $120-$125 million for second-quarter 2026.

raw.headline: MGY Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Volumes and Bolt-On Deals
raw.summary: MGY expects production of approximately 105 Mboe/d and Drilling and Completion (D&C) capital spending of $120-$125 million for second-quarter 2026.

headline: Helmerich & Payne Q2 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Both Down Y/Y
summary: For fiscal 2026, HP expects North America rig activity of 138-144, international activity of 58-68 rigs, cash taxes of $125-$150 million and interest expense of about $100 million.

raw.headline: Helmerich & Payne Q2 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Both Down Y/Y
raw.summary: For fiscal 2026, HP expects North America rig activity of 138-144, international activity of 58-68 rigs, cash taxes of $125-$150 million and interest expense of about $100 million.

headline: Flowco Posts Q1 Results: Time to Buy or Stay on the Sidelines?
summary: FLOC tops Q1 estimates on Production Solutions strength, strong free cash flow and a dividend hike - yet a 57.5% rally and premium valuation loom.

raw.headline: Flowco Posts Q1 Results: Time to Buy or Stay on the Sidelines?

headline: VoltaGrid secures $1bn investment for expansion
summary: VoltaGrid plans to expand its US energy capacity and acquire Propell Energy Technology with support from major institutional investors.

raw.headline: VoltaGrid secures $1bn investment for expansion

headline: A Look At Halliburton (HAL) Valuation After Q1 2026 Beat And Barclays Upgrade
summary: Halliburton (HAL) has been in focus after first quarter 2026 results came in ahead of expectations, helped by cost reduction efforts and a Barclays analyst upgrade that highlighted increased confidence in the company. See our latest analysis for Halliburton. At a share price of $40.26, Halliburton has a 1 month share price return of 7.10% and a year to date share price return of 36.01%. Its 1 year total shareholder return of 94.65% points to strong recent momentum that contrasts with the...
